## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff meeting to align on content strategy and goals for Manifold's engagement with GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/MRARKFn-Bwh6HD8b9PNXRAuDszMZkEs6?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Manifold seeks high-quality, authoritative content on trusted research environments (TREs) and related topics to establish thought leadership](https://fathom.video/share/MRARKFn-Bwh6HD8b9PNXRAuDszMZkEs6?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Focus on differentiators like AI capabilities, cloud flexibility, and solving data management/analysis challenges for life sciences R\&D](https://fathom.video/share/MRARKFn-Bwh6HD8b9PNXRAuDszMZkEs6?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Initial emphasis on TRE content to support upcoming campaign, with goal to expand into more specific technical and scientific topics](https://fathom.video/share/MRARKFn-Bwh6HD8b9PNXRAuDszMZkEs6?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Aim to produce 2-4 high-quality articles per month initially, prioritizing quality over quantity](https://fathom.video/share/MRARKFn-Bwh6HD8b9PNXRAuDszMZkEs6?tab=summary&timestamp=1186.0)

## Topics

### Manifold's Content Needs and Goals

  - [Lacking volume of authoritative content on key topics](https://fathom.video/share/MRARKFn-Bwh6HD8b9PNXRAuDszMZkEs6?tab=summary&timestamp=1928.0)
  - [Need educational content for highly educated, discerning audience](https://fathom.video/share/MRARKFn-Bwh6HD8b9PNXRAuDszMZkEs6?tab=summary&timestamp=1928.0)
  - [Focus on trusted research environment (TRE) space initially](https://fathom.video/share/MRARKFn-Bwh6HD8b9PNXRAuDszMZkEs6?tab=summary&timestamp=1928.0)
  - [Aim to become go-to source for TRE and related information](https://fathom.video/share/MRARKFn-Bwh6HD8b9PNXRAuDszMZkEs6?tab=summary&timestamp=1928.0)
  - [Quality of content critical - audience will quickly spot inaccuracies](https://fathom.video/share/MRARKFn-Bwh6HD8b9PNXRAuDszMZkEs6?tab=summary&timestamp=1928.0)
  - [Quantity important but secondary to quality at outset](https://fathom.video/share/MRARKFn-Bwh6HD8b9PNXRAuDszMZkEs6?tab=summary&timestamp=1928.0)
  - [Goal to at least double current output of \~1 article/month](https://fathom.video/share/MRARKFn-Bwh6HD8b9PNXRAuDszMZkEs6?tab=summary&timestamp=1928.0)

### Key Differentiators and Messaging

  - [AI capabilities as major differentiator](https://fathom.video/share/MRARKFn-Bwh6HD8b9PNXRAuDszMZkEs6?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - ["Bring your own cloud" flexibility](https://fathom.video/share/MRARKFn-Bwh6HD8b9PNXRAuDszMZkEs6?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Solving data management and analysis challenges](https://fathom.video/share/MRARKFn-Bwh6HD8b9PNXRAuDszMZkEs6?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Speed and efficiency in drug development process](https://fathom.video/share/MRARKFn-Bwh6HD8b9PNXRAuDszMZkEs6?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Unified platform vs. fragmented point solutions](https://fathom.video/share/MRARKFn-Bwh6HD8b9PNXRAuDszMZkEs6?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Strategic partnership with Broad Institute](https://fathom.video/share/MRARKFn-Bwh6HD8b9PNXRAuDszMZkEs6?tab=summary&timestamp=1446.0)

### Target Personas and Industries

  - [Chief Research Informatics Officer](https://fathom.video/share/MRARKFn-Bwh6HD8b9PNXRAuDszMZkEs6?tab=summary&timestamp=1088.0)
  - [Chief Scientific Officer](https://fathom.video/share/MRARKFn-Bwh6HD8b9PNXRAuDszMZkEs6?tab=summary&timestamp=1088.0)
  - [IT/Security decision makers](https://fathom.video/share/MRARKFn-Bwh6HD8b9PNXRAuDszMZkEs6?tab=summary&timestamp=1088.0)
  - [Biotech, pharma, diagnostics companies](https://fathom.video/share/MRARKFn-Bwh6HD8b9PNXRAuDszMZkEs6?tab=summary&timestamp=1088.0)
  - [Contract research organizations (CROs)](https://fathom.video/share/MRARKFn-Bwh6HD8b9PNXRAuDszMZkEs6?tab=summary&timestamp=1088.0)
  - [Shifting focus from academic to industry customers](https://fathom.video/share/MRARKFn-Bwh6HD8b9PNXRAuDszMZkEs6?tab=summary&timestamp=1088.0)

### Content Strategy and Approach

  - [Build pillar content on TREs, branch into specific topics](https://fathom.video/share/MRARKFn-Bwh6HD8b9PNXRAuDszMZkEs6?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Leverage upcoming TRE campaign as foundation](https://fathom.video/share/MRARKFn-Bwh6HD8b9PNXRAuDszMZkEs6?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Focus on educational content addressing buyer pain points](https://fathom.video/share/MRARKFn-Bwh6HD8b9PNXRAuDszMZkEs6?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Aim for thought leadership on technical and scientific topics](https://fathom.video/share/MRARKFn-Bwh6HD8b9PNXRAuDszMZkEs6?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Use trusted sources (e.g. .gov sites) for credibility](https://fathom.video/share/MRARKFn-Bwh6HD8b9PNXRAuDszMZkEs6?tab=summary&timestamp=1765.0)
  - [Align with Broad Institute partnership messaging](https://fathom.video/share/MRARKFn-Bwh6HD8b9PNXRAuDszMZkEs6?tab=summary&timestamp=1992.0)

### GrowthX Process and Timeline

  - [Week 1-2: Build content strategy, get feedback](https://fathom.video/share/MRARKFn-Bwh6HD8b9PNXRAuDszMZkEs6?tab=summary&timestamp=1547.0)
  - [Week 3-4: Produce calibration articles, refine approach](https://fathom.video/share/MRARKFn-Bwh6HD8b9PNXRAuDszMZkEs6?tab=summary&timestamp=1547.0)
  - [Week 4-5: Aim for 2-4 quality articles/week with less oversight](https://fathom.video/share/MRARKFn-Bwh6HD8b9PNXRAuDszMZkEs6?tab=summary&timestamp=1547.0)
  - [Flexible to adjust pace and process as needed](https://fathom.video/share/MRARKFn-Bwh6HD8b9PNXRAuDszMZkEs6?tab=summary&timestamp=1547.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Taylor to review and refine company brief document](https://fathom.video/share/MRARKFn-Bwh6HD8b9PNXRAuDszMZkEs6?tab=summary&timestamp=3530.0)
  - [Taylor to add additional context and resources to shared folder](https://fathom.video/share/MRARKFn-Bwh6HD8b9PNXRAuDszMZkEs6?tab=summary&timestamp=3530.0)
  - [Schedule weekly check-in meetings](https://fathom.video/share/MRARKFn-Bwh6HD8b9PNXRAuDszMZkEs6?tab=summary&timestamp=3792.0)
  - [GrowthX to build out initial content strategy for review](https://fathom.video/share/MRARKFn-Bwh6HD8b9PNXRAuDszMZkEs6?tab=summary&timestamp=3792.0)
  - [Begin producing calibration articles within 2-3 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/MRARKFn-Bwh6HD8b9PNXRAuDszMZkEs6?tab=summary&timestamp=3792.0)
